eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following areas: Calcasieu, LA; at 01:43 PM ON FEB 24, 2026 Effective until 06:43 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Urgent: Sulphur Fire is requesting residents on Jodi Dr, Cherry Dr and Janice Dr to evacuate homes due to a gas leak. Remain outside. Do not start vehicles. Call 911 for more information.
